All Classes

  • Class Summary 
    Class Description
    AuthToken
    Represents an auth token in the database
    AuthTokenDao
    Handles all database operations for persons
    ClearResult
    Response body for the Clear API call (the parent class Result can handle all the functionality)
    ClearService
    Handles the clear functionality - Delete all data from the database (user accounts, auth tokens, persons, and events)
    Dao
    General database operations
    Event
    Describes an event in the database
    EventDao
    Handles all database operations for events
    EventIDResult
    Response body for the /event/eventID API call
    EventIDService
    Handles the functionality of retrieving of a single event
    EventResult
    Response body for the /event API call
    EventService
    Handles the functionality of retrieving all events of all family members (Returns ALL events for ALL family members of the current user.
    FillResult
    Response body for the Fill API call (the parent class Result can handle all the functionality)
    FillService
    Handles the fill functionality Populates the server's database with generated data for the specified user name.
    LoadRequest
    Pojo for the Load request body
    LoadResult
    Response body for the Load API call (the parent class Result can handle all the functionality)
    LoadService
    Handles the load functionality Clears all data from the database (just like the /clear API), and then loads the posted user, person, and event data into the database.
    LoginRequest
    Pojo for the Login request body
    LoginResult
    Response body for the Login API call
    LoginService
    Handles the login functionality - Logs in the user and returns an auth token
    Person
    Person pojo: to represent people/ancestors in the database
    PersonDao
    Handles all database operations for persons
    PersonIDResult
    Response body for the person/personID API call
    PersonIDService
    Handles the functionality of retrieving of a single person - Returns the single Person object with the specified ID
    PersonResult
    Response body for the /person API call
    PersonService
    Handles the functionality of retrieving all family members - Returns ALL family members of the current user.
    RegisterRequest
    Pojo for the Register request body
    RegisterResult
    Response body for the Register API call
    RegisterService
    Handles the register functionality - Creates a new user account, generates 4 generations of ancestor data for the new user, logs the user in, and returns an auth token.
    Request
    Default Request parent class
    Result  
    Service
    Handles the default service functionality, parent class
    User
    User account (stores information about each user's account in the database
    UserDao
    Handles all the database operations for users
